case_title: TAN, HELEN vs. CARSON FRANCO et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAN, HELEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARSON FRANCO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1461 VALENCIA ST. GARAGE SPACE, ONLY, LEASE FORFEITED
